UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT THOMAS A. BROCATO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION (CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE WHETHER CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION WAS CAUSED BY FAILURE TO MAKE REPAIRS AFTER THE FIRE OF FAILURE TO MAINTAIN THE PROPERTY PRIOR TO THE FIRE. DEMURER TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF BUSINESS AND PROFESSIONS CODE 17200) IS OVERRULED, RESTITUTION OF OVERPAID RENT MAY BE SOUGHT AS "PROFITS UNFAIRLY OBTAINED TO THE EXTENT THAT THESE PROFITS REPRESENT MONIES GIVEN TO THE DEFENDANT OR BENEFITS IN WHICH THE PLAINTIFF HAS AN OWNERSHIP INTEREST." KOREA SUPPLY V. LOCKHEAD MARTIN CORP. (2003) 29 CAL.4TH 1134. DEMURER TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CCC 1950.5) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE THAT TENANCY WAS TERMINATED. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT THOMAS A. BROCATO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the 7th cause of action (constructive eviction) is sustained with leave to amend to allege whether constructive eviction was caused by failure to make repairs after the fire of failure to maintain the property prior to the fire. Demurer to the 9th cause of action (violation of Business and Professions Code 17200) is overruled, restitution of overpaid rent may be sought as "profits unfairly obtained to the extent that these profits represent monies given to the defendant or benefits in which the plaintiff has an ownership interest." Korea Supply v. Lockhead Martin Corp. (2003) 29 Cal.4th 1134. Demurer to the 10th cause of action (violation of CCC 1950.5) is sustained with leave to amend to allege that tenancy was terminated. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
